name: SaaS & Product Companies
description: Scaling web and mobile architectures for hyper-growth digital products. Custom analytics integration, Stripe recurring payments, and multi-tenant DB schemas.
benefit: Accelerate time-to-market by 40% with pre-engineered auth, billing, and edge-layout primitives.

name: Digital Healthcare & MedTech
description: Building HIPAA-compliant telemedicine platforms, medical record managers, and secure patient onboarding forms with end-to-end data encryption.
benefit: Absolute data integrity, 100% compliance configurations, and ultra-secure file encryption storage.

name: FinTech & Secure Banking
description: Engineering high-performance dashboard charts, decentralized ledgers, bank feed sync hooks, and strict anti-fraud transaction logging systems.
benefit: Sub-millisecond data loading times and strict CSP sandboxing preventing data leaks.

name: VC-Backed Startups

benefit: Go from raw requirements to investor-ready deployment in under 30 days.

name: Next-Gen E-Commerce
